response: Prior to producing *Nine Days that Changed the World*, Newt Gingrich was a political consultant. He worked closely with former U.S. Representative and Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich, and was executive director of the National Republican Congressional Committee in the mid-1980s. He also worked for GOPAC, a political action committee that played a key role in the 1994 Republican takeover of the U.S. Congress.
